openclaw_path_desc: Path to your OpenClaw installation on the server. Agents are discovered from this directory.
gateway_url_desc: How the server reaches OpenClaw. Default works for local installs.
gateway_token_desc: Auth token for chat & live status. Auto-read from OpenClaw config. Override to connect to a different instance.
hermes_connection_desc: Connects local Hermes Agent profiles as first-class office agents. Virtual Office uses the Hermes CLI and safe status/session surfaces, not raw secrets or private memory files.
hermes_docker_hint: For Docker, mount the Hermes home/CLI into the container and use the mounted paths here.
internal_bubble_timeout_hint: Use 0 to keep Internal bubbles expanded.
meeting_preparing_timeout_hint: Preparing meetings release automatically if they are not started before this timeout.
ui_font_size_hint: Scales interface panels only. Canvas labels stay unchanged.
api_usage_desc: Auto-detects providers from your OpenClaw config (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, etc.). Shows live usage quotas, API key health, and token expiry. No extra setup needed.
metrics_url_desc: URL of the PC running pc-metrics-server.py. Can be local or remote.
agent_browser_desc: Give your AI agents a real web browser they can control. You can watch them browse in real time through a live viewer panel.
cdp_url_desc: The Chrome DevTools Protocol endpoint. Usually runs on the same machine as Virtual Office. Use 127.0.0.1 if the browser container is local.
viewer_url_desc: The URL that loads in the floating browser window. Must be reachable from your browser (not localhost if you're accessing remotely). Use HTTP to avoid certificate issues.
reset_warning: Resets all furniture, agents, and branches to defaults.
help_navigation: Navigation: Scroll to zoom, click+drag to pan
help_edit_office: Edit Office: Place/move furniture, walls, floor colors
help_agents: Agents: Customize appearance, assign desks, set branches
help_multi_select: Multi-select: Double-click empty space → drag to select area. Or Ctrl+click items one by one.
help_move_group: Move group: After multi-selecting, click+hold any selected item to drag them all together.
help_shortcuts: Shortcuts: Del = delete selected, Esc = cancel, click empty = deselect all
sms_unavailable_hint: SMS panel is disabled. Enable SMS Panel in Settings and configure Twilio credentials.
browser_unavailable_hint: Agent Browser is disabled. Enable Agent Browser in Settings and configure the browser endpoints.
no_scores: No scores yet — complete tasks to earn XP!
choose_thread: Choose a thread to view the conversation.
select_contact_thread: Select a contact thread on the left, or open a number to start a new one.
sms_input_placeholder: Switch this thread to User to reply manually...
no_messages_yet: No messages in this thread yet.
select_thread_to_open: Select a thread to open the conversation.
agent_owns_thread: Agent owns this thread. Switch it to User to reply manually...
threads_waiting_latest_reply: thread waiting on the latest reply
license_key_desc: Enter your license key to unlock all features, or continue with the free demo.
demo_mode: Demo mode: Free to use with up to 3 agents. Browser panel, SMS panel, model manager, cron manager, and whisper are locked.
full_license: Full license ($35.99): Unlimited agents, all features unlocked.
early_bird: Early bird ($9.99): Same as full — limited-time launch price.
name_office_desc: Give your virtual office a name. This appears in the sidebar and page title.
connect_providers_desc: Tell the Virtual Office where your agent runtimes live. OpenClaw and Hermes agents can appear together in the same office.
oc_home_hint: This is the folder that contains your openclaw.json and agents/ directory.
docker_mount: Use the path you mounted with -v.
not_sure: Not sure? Run this in your terminal:
no_agents_title: 🔧 No agents found? Here's what to check:
no_agents_1: 1. Is the path correct? The folder should contain openclaw.json and an agents/ directory.
no_agents_2: 2. Do you have agents configured? Open your openclaw.json and look for agents → list.
no_agents_3: 3. Running in Docker? Make sure you mounted your OpenClaw directory into the container.
no_agents_4: 4. Permissions? The Virtual Office server needs read access to the agents/ folder.
no_agents_5: Still stuck? You can skip this step and set the path later from ☰ Menu. The office will work — agents just won't appear until connected.
hermes_desc: Virtual Office can also discover Hermes Agent profiles and show them beside OpenClaw agents.
hermes_docker_hint_setup: Running in Docker? Mount the Hermes home/CLI into the container and enter the mounted paths.
agent_browser_setup_desc: Connect a browser so your agents can browse the web and you can watch live. You can skip this and set it up later.
cdp_setup_desc: The address where Chrome/Chromium remote debugging is running.
viewer_setup_desc: URL for the live browser view (KasmVNC, noVNC, etc.).
what_is_browser_desc: The Agent Browser gives your AI agents a real web browser you can watch live.
what_is_sms_desc: The SMS Panel lets you send and receive text messages through an AI agent in your office.
sms_panel_desc: Let an AI agent send and receive SMS messages through your office. You can skip this and set it up later.
sms_owner_desc: This agent owns the Twilio inbox and is the default AI responder for every contact thread.
twilio_required: All three Twilio fields are required for sending SMS.
pc_performance_desc: Monitor a PC's CPU, RAM, and GPU stats live in your office dashboard. You can skip this and set it up later.
youre_all_set_desc: Your Virtual Office is ready. You can always change settings later from the ☰ Menu button in the toolbar.
add_in_custom: Add one in the Custom Providers tab with name "ollama"
one_shot_hint: One-shot — runs once at this date/time (your timezone)
send_to_hint: Telegram chat ID, Discord channel/user ID, or phone number
interval_invalid: Interval must be at least 1 minute
delivery_to_required: Delivery "Send To" is required when announcing
chat_hermes_needs_approval: Hermes needs user approval before it can continue.
chat_earlier_tools_collapsed: Earlier live tool activity was collapsed to keep the chat responsive.
delete_branch_note: Deleting a branch moves agents here.
meeting_purpose_placeholder: What result should this meeting produce?
meeting_provider_timeout_monitor: Meeting response exceeded the timeout and will be skipped so the meeting can continue.
meeting_user_message_placeholder: Add a live comment for the agents.
meeting_add_context_placeholder: Add facts or constraints for later turns.
meeting_intervention_required: Enter a message or additional context.
meeting_decision_window_hint: A formal round is complete. Ask one participant, add context, or continue the agenda.
meeting_decision_summary_hint: The final formal round is complete. Ask one participant, add context, or wait for the moderator to summarize and end.
meeting_target_question_placeholder: Ask this participant to respond before the next round.
meeting_new_agenda_placeholder: Set the agenda for upcoming turns.
meeting_arbitration_hint: Choose a decision, continue discussion, or end with no consensus.
meeting_arbitration_waiting_hint: The meeting has unresolved disagreement. Choose a decision, continue discussion, or end with no consensus.
meeting_arbitration_decision_placeholder: Write the user decision to finalize.
meeting_moderator_takeover_hint: The moderator failed while summarizing. Take over manually or choose another moderator to retry.
meeting_takeover_summary_placeholder: Write the final summary to close the meeting.
meeting_history_search_placeholder: Search topics, summaries, turns, or action items
proj_no_projects_text: Create your first project to get started
proj_workflow_chat_empty: Workflow chat will appear here when a task is being worked on.
proj_long_term_project_hint: Long-term projects can recommend a project scheduled task, but nothing is created or enabled automatically.
proj_scheduled_cron_recommend_text: Use a project scheduled task to keep work moving or run recurring project tasks. It is only created after you save the form.
proj_scheduled_cron_subtitle: Uses global Cron scheduling and binds it to this project
proj_scheduled_cron_paused_subtitle: Paused. This project's scheduled tasks will not dispatch.
proj_scheduled_cron_empty: This project has no scheduled tasks yet
proj_scheduled_cron_history_subtitle: Latest {count} project scheduled task dispatch results
proj_scheduled_cron_repeat_gate_hint: If the target task is already Done, retriggering is controlled by the task detail setting "Allow this task to be retriggered".
proj_scheduled_cron_repeat_gate_open: Task is open and can run
proj_scheduled_cron_error_interval: Interval must be at least 1 minute
proj_scheduled_cron_error_at: Select a one-time execution date and time
proj_scheduled_cron_save_failed: Failed to save project scheduled task: {message}
proj_scheduled_cron_run_failed: Failed to run project scheduled task: {message}
proj_scheduled_cron_update_failed: Failed to update project scheduled task: {message}
proj_scheduled_cron_delete_failed: Failed to delete project scheduled task: {message}
proj_task_scheduled_repeat_enabled: Allow this task to be retriggered
proj_task_scheduled_repeat_hint: When enabled, this task can be retriggered manually or by a project scheduled task even after it is Done; it will be reopened and executed again.
proj_delete_confirm: Delete this project? This cannot be undone.
proj_template_choose: Choose a template to create a new project, or save your current project as a template.
proj_leaderboard_empty: No scores yet — complete tasks to earn XP!
proj_blank_project_desc: Start from scratch with 5 default columns
proj_software_dev_desc: Standard software development workflow with sprint planning
browser_not_configured_msg:
Set a Browser Viewer URL in
☰ Menu → Settings or /setup
hero_sub: A live pixel-art workspace where your AI agents walk, work, and talk. Watch them in real time. Chat with them. Customize everything. Self-hosted with Docker.
features_title:
Everything your AI team needs.
In one place.
feat_live_presence_desc: See which agents are working, idle, or in meetings. Pixel-art characters walk around the office in real time.
feat_chat_desc: Talk to any agent directly from the office. Chat bubbles appear above agents showing live conversations.
feat_editor_desc: Place desks, furniture, walls, and doors. Paint floors and walls. Create branches and rooms. Make it yours.
feat_browser_desc: Give agents a real browser and watch them browse live. Floating popup with Take Control mode.
feat_model_mgr_desc: Switch agent models on the fly. Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Ollama, LM Studio, and any OpenAI-compatible provider.
feat_cron_desc: Create scheduled tasks for any agent. System events, standalone runs, one-shots — all from a visual UI.
feat_sms_desc: Send and receive text messages through agents via Twilio. Monitor conversations and intervene when needed.
feat_custom_desc: Agent appearances, desk positions, wall colors, floor tiles, day/night cycle, weather — customize everything.
feat_api_usage_desc: Monitor token usage and costs across all providers. See which agents consume the most resources.
demo_title:
More than a dashboard.
A living workspace.
demo_sub: Agents don't just show status — they walk around, visit each other, hold meetings at tables, and wander to the lounge when idle.
demo_card1_desc: 15+ agents occupying desks, walking hallways, holding 1:1 meetings. Each with unique pixel-art appearance.
demo_card2_desc: Drag-and-drop furniture, paint walls, create rooms and branches. Canvas expands as your team grows.
demo_card3_desc: Live browser view with floating popup. See exactly what your agents see. Take control when needed.
pricing_sub: Pay once, self-host forever. Free updates included.
price_note_early: Instant delivery. Enter key in setup wizard.
price_full_4: Support the project at full price
price_note_full: Same product. For those who want to pay full.
setup_step2_desc: Go to http://localhost:8090 — the setup wizard walks you through connecting to OpenClaw and detecting your agents.
setup_step3_desc: Paste your key in the setup wizard to unlock all features. Or skip and use the free demo with 3 agents.
setup_step4_desc: Place furniture, assign desks, customize agent appearances, paint walls. Make it yours.
faq_q1: What do I need to run this?
faq_a1: Docker and an OpenClaw installation. That's it. Works on Linux, Mac, and Windows (WSL).
faq_a2: No. It's self-hosted software you run on your own machine. Your data never leaves your server. No accounts, no telemetry.
faq_a3: docker pull and restart. Your config and customizations are stored in a mounted volume — updates don't touch them.
faq_a4: Yes. The free demo includes 3 agents, chat, presence, the editor, and the model manager. No key required.
faq_q5: What's the difference between Early Bird and Full?
faq_a5: Nothing — same product, same features, same updates. Early Bird is just a limited-time launch discount. Get it while it lasts.
faq_a6: OpenClaw is an open-source AI agent framework. Virtual Office is a visual layer that runs on top of it. Learn more →
demo_banner: ⚡ DEMO — 3 agents max, some features locked. <u>Get a license key</u>
reset_chat_windows: Reset all chat windows to equal size
place_item_hint:
Click item to place
Right-click / Esc to cancel
place_canvas_hint:
Click canvas to place
Right-click / Esc to cancel
summary_required: Summary is required to end the meeting.

delete_library_skill_confirm: Delete skill "{{name}}" from the library? Agent copies are not affected.
new_session_confirm: Start a new session for {{agent}}? This clears the conversation history.
compress_context_confirm: Compress the current Codex context? Visible chat history will be kept.
stop_preserves_changes: Stop sent. Existing file changes are not rolled back.
reasoning_summary_hint: Codex-provided reasoning summary, available only when emitted by the runtime.
codex_session_scope_hint: Session approval scope and lifetime are controlled by the Codex runtime.

enter_viewer_url: Please enter a Browser Viewer URL
cdp_connected: ✅ Connected! CDP is reachable and viewer URL is set.
no_agents_path: No agents found at this path. Check the troubleshooting tips or try another path.
lmstudio_add_hint: Add one in the Custom Providers tab with name "lmstudio"
wss_failed_hint: WebSocket over HTTPS failed. Check whether the browser trusts the TLS certificate.
website_title: Your Virtual Office — A Visual Workspace for AI Agents
preview_chat_message: Moe: Mike, check the inbox for the SR 985 submittal...
cdp_check_hint: CDP not reachable. Check the URL and browser container.
viewer_reachable: ✅ Viewer reachable. Open the browser panel to see the live view.
viewer_not_reachable: Viewer not reachable from this browser
import_config_confirm: Import this config? This will replace your current office layout.
full_reset_confirm: FULL RESET: Delete all office customizations?
reset_type_confirm: This cannot be undone. Type RESET in the next prompt to confirm.
premium_edit_office: Edit Office is a premium feature. Get a license key to unlock it.
premium_agent_editor: Agent Editor is a premium feature. Get a license key to unlock it.
agent_role_prompt: Role (for example, Email specialist or QA engineer):
delete_agent_confirm: Delete agent "{{name}}" from {{provider}}? Workspace files, memory, and session history will be permanently removed.
no_agents_create: No agents. Click ➕ New Agent to create one.
skill_exists_library: Skill already exists in the Skill Library.
save_skill_library_hint: Save this agent skill to the shared Skill Library
overwrite_skill_confirm: "{{name}}" already exists on this agent. Overwrite?
retry_hermes_allow_hint: Retry this Hermes turn with approval bypass for this invocation only
retry_hermes_deny_hint: Do not retry this blocked Hermes command
proj_dirty_workspace_confirm:
The workspace has uncommitted changes. Continuing will not roll them back.

{{files}}
proj_stopping_task: Stopping task; existing file changes will be kept
setup_license_note:
Demo mode: Free for up to 3 agents; some features are locked.

Full license: Unlimited agents and all features.
Early bird: Same features at a limited-time launch price.

Get your key at myvirtualoffice.ai
setup_browser_note:
What is this? Agent Browser provides a live browser controlled through CDP and viewed through VNC.

Project Agent Browser Docker setup:
./start.sh --browser

This command starts only the Agent Browser Docker service; run the main app separately with ./start.sh in another terminal.

CDP: http://127.0.0.1:9224
Viewer: https://127.0.0.1:6901

You can skip this and configure it later.
setup_sms_note:
What you need: A Twilio account, phone number, Account SID, and Auth Token.

Incoming MMS can display when credentials are configured. Outgoing attachments require a public HTTPS media URL that Twilio can access. Text-only SMS works without one.

You can skip this and configure it later.
setup_metrics_note:
How it works: Run the included metrics server on the computer to monitor.

pip install psutil
python pc-metrics-server.py 8099

Use http://127.0.0.1:8099 locally or the computer's LAN/Tailscale address remotely. NVIDIA GPU monitoring also requires pynvml.
setup_done_note:
What you can do:
• Edit the office layout and colors
• Customize agents and assign desks
• Chat with agents
• Change connection settings and export/import configuration

Live presence: Long-running agent work remains visible until it finishes.

API usage: Provider usage and credential health are detected from OpenClaw automatically.
delete_branch_confirm: Delete branch "{{name}}"? Agents will be moved to Unassigned.
setup_openclaw_path_note:
📁 Where to find it:

Linux/Mac (most common):
/home/youruser/.openclaw

Running Virtual Office in Docker?
Use the path mounted with -v. Example:
docker run -v /home/eli/.openclaw:/openclaw ...
Enter /openclaw.

Not sure? Run ls ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json. If it prints a path, use its folder.
setup_no_agents_note:
🔧 No agents found? Check the following:

1. Is the path correct? The folder should contain openclaw.json and an agents/ directory.

2. Are agents configured? Open openclaw.json and check agents → list. Each agent needs a workspace directory.

3. Running in Docker? Mount the OpenClaw directory into the container:
docker run -v /path/to/.openclaw:/openclaw ...

4. Permissions? The server needs read access to the agents/ folder.

Still stuck? Skip this step and configure the path later from ☰ Menu.
gateway_origin_added: Origin added to the allowed list.
gateway_running_hint: Make sure the OpenClaw Gateway is running. Virtual Office needs its WebSocket connection for live agent status and chat.
codex_interaction_unavailable: This Codex interaction can no longer be resumed.
hermes_step_load_profile: Load Hermes profile and current session
hermes_step_wait_updates: Wait for model, tools, and task updates
hermes_step_render_reply: Render reply, tool calls, and task summary
hermes_queued_waiting: Queued in Virtual Office. Waiting for Hermes to start.
hermes_review_error: Review the Hermes error in chat
hermes_reply_collected: Hermes reply and session activity collected.
meeting_fixture_invite_gg_urgency_3: Invite gg to urgency 3 AI meeting
meeting_fixture_invite_gg_urgency_3_summ: User requested Codex to start an urgency 3 AI meeting and invite gg. This task exists as the required project-task source for the meeting request.
meeting_conflict_risk_meeting_occupied: Agent is already in another active meeting. Do not force join unless the existing meeting is cancelled.
meeting_conflict_resume_none: No original task can be resumed from this meeting conflict.
meeting_conflict_risk_provider_call: A provider call is in progress. Interrupting can lose an in-flight response.
meeting_conflict_resume_provider_call: Wait for the provider call to finish, then retry conflict handling.
meeting_conflict_risk_logical_pause: The current task can only be logically paused; the provider process may not stop immediately.
meeting_conflict_resume_logical_pause: Save current task context and resume from the recorded task state after the meeting.
meeting_conflict_resume_recheck: Recheck the agent state before forcing a meeting.
meeting_reservation_notice: Reservations are reminders only; conflicts are rechecked before the meeting starts.
meeting_conflict_reserve_prompt: Reminder timing is based on the agent's availability.
meeting_conflict_force_confirm: Force join can interrupt current work. Continue?
meeting_action_drafts_hint: Confirming creates a project task. Drafts do not execute automatically.
